pr.title: Non-record: Hybrid Depth-Recurrent Transformer + Int5 Quantization Studies

output.summary: Hybrid depth-recurrent transformer loops 8 shared layers with int6/int8 quantization plus novel precomputed word-position, copy, and unigram features to close quantization compounding.
techniques: Hybrid entry/exit int6 layers with looped int8 shared blocks
Precomputed word-position/copy/unigram features projected via zero-init
Block-level torch.compile and DDP tweaks for shared-loop params
